import json

# Parse the context string into a dictionary
signal_data = json.loads(context)

# Print the parsed data to inspect its structure
print("Parsed signal data:")
print(signal_data)

# Extract key information for analysis
signal_id = signal_data.get("signal_id")
signal_type = signal_data.get("signal_type")
severity = signal_data.get("severity")
product_id = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("product_id")
category = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("category")
brand = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("brand")
summary = signal_data.get("signal", {}).get("summary")
action_items = signal_data.get("suggested_action_items", [])
raw_data_sample = signal_data.get("raw_data_sample", {})
availability_status = raw_data_sample.get("availability_status")

analysis = f"""
Signal Analysis for Signal ID: {signal_id}
-------------------------------------------------
Signal Type: {signal_type}
Severity: {severity}

Catalog Entity:
  Product ID: {product_id}
  Category: {category}
  Brand: {brand}

Summary of the Issue: {summary}

Raw Data Sample Details for Product {product_id}:
  Product Name: {raw_data_sample.get('name', 'N/A')}
  Availability Status: {availability_status}

Suggested Action Items:
"""

if action_items:
    for item in action_items:
        analysis += f"  - Action: {item.get('action_type')}\n"
        analysis += f"    Description: {item.get('description')}\n"
        analysis += f"    Details: {item.get('details')}\n"
        analysis += f"    Priority: {item.get('priority')}\n"
else:
    analysis += "  No specific action items suggested."

print(analysis)

FINAL(analysis)

import json

# The context string has a prefix that needs to be removed before JSON parsing.
# The prefix is "Analyze this signal via REPL: "
json_string_start_index = context.find("{")
if json_string_start_index != -1:
    json_part = context[json_string_start_index:]
else:
    # Fallback if the '{' is not found, although it should be present in this context
    # This might indicate an unexpected context format
    raise ValueError("Could not find the start of the JSON object in the context.")

# Parse the JSON part of the context string into a dictionary
signal_data = json.loads(json_part)

# Print the parsed data to inspect its structure
print("Parsed signal data:")
print(signal_data)

# Extract key information for analysis
signal_id = signal_data.get("signal_id")
signal_type = signal_data.get("signal_type")
severity = signal_data.get("severity")
product_id = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("product_id")
category = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("category")
brand = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("brand")
summary = signal_data.get("signal", {}).get("summary")
action_items = signal_data.get("suggested_action_items", [])
raw_data_sample = signal_data.get("raw_data_sample", {})
availability_status = raw_data_sample.get("availability_status")

analysis = f"""
Signal Analysis for Signal ID: {signal_id}
-------------------------------------------------
Signal Type: {signal_type}
Severity: {severity}

Catalog Entity:
  Product ID: {product_id}
  Category: {category}
  Brand: {brand}

Summary of the Issue: {summary}

Raw Data Sample Details for Product {product_id}:
  Product Name: {raw_data_sample.get('name', 'N/A')}
  Availability Status: {availability_status}

Suggested Action Items:
"""

if action_items:
    for item in action_items:
        analysis += f"  - Action: {item.get('action_type')}\n"
        analysis += f"    Description: {item.get('description')}\n"
        analysis += f"    Details: {item.get('details')}\n"
        analysis += f"    Priority: {item.get('priority')}\n"
else:
    analysis += "  No specific action items suggested."

print(analysis)

FINAL(analysis)
